name: xcode
description: GUI-first Xcode.app automation for Codex, with plugin-routed CLI support for builds, simulators, results, diagnostics, and native Xcode state sensing.

interface.shortDescription: Control Xcode.app through the GUI first, with plugin-routed CLI support when needed
interface.longDescription: GUI-first Xcode workflows for Codex. When this plugin is explicitly mentioned, agents should control the open Xcode.app window through bin/xcode ide/native commands before using command-line validation. The stable bin/xcode dispatcher also provides shared-cache xcodebuild validation, simulator lifecycle commands, xcresulttool summaries, warning parsing, read-only context inspection, packaging validation, and environment diagnostics. Bare xcodebuild, simctl, xcresulttool, osascript, open -a Xcode, and old xcode-cli-shared-cache-build usage should be avoided; the plugin dispatcher owns those paths. The plugin does not depend on XcodeBuildMCP, and Apple's mcpbridge is treated as optional.
defaultPrompt: Control the open Xcode window and run the selected scheme through the GUI
Use Xcode.app GUI automation to build or test this project
Diagnose my local Xcode GUI, Accessibility, and simulator setup
Inspect native Xcode app state and Accessibility readiness
